name: Freshsales
description: Freshsales is a CRM by Freshworks for sales teams. Manage contacts, accounts, deals, and sales activities with AI-powered lead scoring, built-in phone, and email tracking.

capabilities.name: search_contacts
capabilities.description: Search for contacts by name, email, phone, or custom fields.

capabilities.name: create_contact
capabilities.description: Create a new contact with personal and business information.

capabilities.name: list_deals
capabilities.description: List deals with filtering by pipeline stage and owner.

capabilities.name: create_deal
capabilities.description: Create a new deal with amount, expected close date, and pipeline stage.

capabilities.name: create_note
capabilities.description: Add a note to a contact, account, or deal.

capabilities.name: list_accounts
capabilities.description: List all accounts (companies) with optional search and filtering.
